docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF CERTIFIED MAILING TO DEFENDANT 4/25/22 **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** FILED BY PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED JUL-19-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-07-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TYAGLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVIE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM C. LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,846.56 FILED BY TYAGLO, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY $1,046.56 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,196.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-08-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-10-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TYAGLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON MARCH 14, 2022 IS INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. AGENT OF SERVICE ADDRESS LISTED ON THE RETURN CERTIFIED MAIL CARD IS NOT CORRECT. DEFENDANT TO BE SERVED WAS NOT INDICATED ON THE CERTIFIED MAIL. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: REGISTERED AGENT SOLUTIONS, INC.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TYAGLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY JESSICA BALLARD, DIRECTOR OF CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF ORALLY DECLEARTION TO UPDATE ADDRESS AS ADDRESS ON CLAIM FORM IS MISSING APARTMENT NUMBER #7B, COURTROOM CLERK UPDATED PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS IN THE SYSTEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JESSICA BALLARD, DIRECTOR OF CLAIMS. FILED BY DEFENDANT OUTDOORSY
